481.reason: [Accessing tokens[tokenPos + 2] may cause out-of-bounds access when tokenPos is near the end of tokens vector; also logic for distinguishing Decl from FuncDef/MainFuncDef is flawed because it assumes specific lookahead without proper bounds or grammar-based prediction]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokens[tokenPos + 2] may cause out-of-bounds access when tokenPos is near the end of tokens vector; also logic for distinguishing Decl from FuncDef/MainFuncDef is flawed because it assumes specific lookahead without proper bounds or grammar-based prediction]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokens[tokenPos + 2] without checking bounds may cause out-of-range access; also logic for detecting Decl is flawed because it assumes the next token after two positions determines if it's a declaration, which doesn't align with grammar]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokens[tokenPos + 2] may cause out-of-bounds access when tokenPos is near the end of the token stream; also, the condition logic for distinguishing Decl from FuncDef/MainFuncDef is flawed because it assumes a fixed lookahead without proper bounds or grammar-based prediction]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is flawed: it assumes at least three tokens ahead exist and uses an arbitrary lookahead; may cause out-of-bounds access or incorrect parsing when input doesn't match expected pattern]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is unsafe: it assumes at least 3 tokens exist ahead and that Decl ends before any '('; also, it may access out-of-bounds tokens when input is short or malformed. Moreover, the logic for distinguishing Decl from FuncDef/MainFuncDef based on lookahead is incorrect—'(' after 'main' is part of MainFuncDef, but Decl doesn't necessarily end before any '(' elsewhere.]

486.reason: [Similarly, tokens[tokenPos + 1] may be out-of-bounds; also, this loop condition incorrectly assumes that any non-MainFuncDef after Decl must be FuncDef, but doesn't verify function signature structure and may skip or misparse]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Similarly, tokens[tokenPos + 1] may be out-of-bounds; also, this loop condition incorrectly assumes that any non-MainFuncDef after Decl must be FuncDef, but doesn't verify function signature structure and may skip or misparse]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Similarly, accessing tokens[tokenPos + 1] without bound check and using incorrect lookahead logic to distinguish FuncDef from MainFuncDef; this can lead to infinite loops or crashes on invalid input]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Similarly, tokens[tokenPos + 1] may be out of bounds; moreover, this loop assumes that all non-MainFuncDef functions appear before main, but fails to handle cases where there are no functions or when tokenPos has already advanced beyond valid tokens. The condition does not correctly implement the grammar CompUnit → {Decl} {FuncDef} MainFuncDef because it uses fragile lookahead instead of checking current token against expected first sets.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Similarly flawed: unsafe token lookahead without checking vector bounds; also logic error—FuncDef should be parsed until 'main' is found, but this condition may skip valid FuncDefs or enter infinite loop if MAINTK never appears]}
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is also unsafe: it accesses tokens[tokenPos + 1] without checking bounds, and the logic is flawed—FuncDef may not be followed immediately by MAINTK; also, if there are no FuncDef, this loop may incorrectly try to parse FuncDef when next token isn't MAINTK. The grammar allows {Decl} {FuncDef} MainFuncDef, but this code assumes all Decl come first until a '(' is seen (which may belong to FuncDef or MainFuncDef), then all FuncDef until MAINTK—but lookahead is insufficient and error-prone.]
